{{Infobox character
| name = Lizard-man
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A lizard-man figure in dark red clothes leaped through [[Simon]]'s window.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The lizard-man has pebbled rust-red skin and a long lizard's tail.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The lizard-man's fingers are tipped by long claws.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The lizard-man wears ornate, multi-layered red clothes stitched with unknown symbols.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
